title: Basel Operational Risk BIA Classification
summary: Classify Chinese operational-risk loss events into Basel event categories and business lines, then calculate regulatory capital under the Basic Indicator Approach.
taskPrompt:
You are working on a Linux VM as an operational-risk analyst.

## Task Directory
`base`

## Visible Inputs
- Task prompt: `base/input/TASK_PROMPT.md`
- Raw Chinese loss events: `base/input/operational_risk_events.xlsx`
- Basel loss event categories: `base/input/loss_event_categories.xlsx`
- Basel business line mapping: `base/input/business_line_mapping.xlsx`
- BIA capital parameters: `base/input/capital_calculation_params.xlsx`
- Output schemas/examples: `base/input/output_schemas`

## Your Task
Classify each of the 60 loss events into one Basel loss event category code
(`EL1` through `EL7`) and one Basel business line code (`BL1` through `BL8`).
Then calculate operational-risk regulatory capital under the Basel Basic
Indicator Approach.

Write all final files under `base/output`:
- `classified_events.csv`
- `capital_calculation.json`
- `execution_log.txt`

Follow the file contracts in `base/input/TASK_PROMPT.md` and the schemas under
`base/input/output_schemas`. Do not modify files under `base/input`.
agentMustDo: Read all 60 Chinese operational-risk event descriptions.
Assign one Basel loss event category code from `EL1` through `EL7` to each event.
Assign one Basel business line code from `BL1` through `BL8` to each event.
Calculate operational-risk regulatory capital using the Basel Basic Indicator Approach parameters.
Write `classified_events.csv`, `capital_calculation.json`, and `execution_log.txt` under the output directory.

inputFiles.name: TASK_PROMPT.md
inputFiles.description: Solve-time task instructions and output contract.

inputFiles.name: operational_risk_events.xlsx
inputFiles.description: Chinese operational-risk event records to classify.

inputFiles.name: loss_event_categories.xlsx
inputFiles.description: Basel loss event category definitions and indicators.

inputFiles.name: business_line_mapping.xlsx
inputFiles.description: Basel business line definitions and mapping guidance.

inputFiles.name: capital_calculation_params.xlsx
inputFiles.description: BIA alpha coefficient and gross income parameters.

inputFiles.name: output_schemas
inputFiles.description: Required schemas and format examples for the deliverables.

referenceFiles.name: classified_events.csv
referenceFiles.description: One row per event with `Event_ID`, `Loss_Event_Category`, `Business_Line`, and `Loss_Amount_CNY`.

referenceFiles.name: capital_calculation.json
referenceFiles.description: Structured BIA calculation fields and final operational-risk regulatory capital.

referenceFiles.name: execution_log.txt
referenceFiles.description: Brief note describing how the analysis was performed.

evaluation: The evaluator requires all three output files. The classification CSV must contain all 60 expected event IDs exactly once, use valid `EL1`-`EL7` and `BL1`-`BL8` codes, and preserve loss amounts. The task returns `1.0` only when loss event category accuracy is at least 90%, business line accuracy is at least 90%, loss amounts are preserved, and the final BIA capital value is within the configured absolute or relative tolerance. Otherwise it returns `0.0`.

classifier.rationale: The task involves classifying operational risk and calculating regulatory capital, which aligns with actuarial and risk modeling.
